description: Features enriquecidas com conhecimento acumulado - TCO/Traction/Apex Tire

features.name: Dimensions / Dimension Assignment
features.objective: Permitir atribuicao de dimensoes customizadas (Customer Type, CX, Division) a Products/Services e Fixed Assets usando sugestoes de AI
features.expected_behavior: Pagina mostra lista de items com colunas de dimensao e botoes Confirm para aceitar sugestoes AI

notes_template.intuit: Dimension assignment page working correctly. Shows Products/Services with AI-suggested values for Customer Type, CX, Division. Confirm buttons active.
notes_template.internal: Navigation via direct URL: https://qbo.intuit.com/app/dimensions/assignment

features.name: Dimensions on Spreadsheet Sync
features.objective: Suporte a dimensoes no Spreadsheet Sync para exportar dados dimensionais para Excel/Sheets
features.expected_behavior: Spreadsheet Sync inclui colunas de dimensao nos exports

notes_template.intuit: Spreadsheet Sync available with dimension column support for data exports.
notes_template.internal: Shares evidence with Dimension Assignment feature.

features.name: DTM Multiple Shipping Addresses
features.objective: Permitir multiplos enderecos de entrega por cliente (parity com QB Desktop)
features.expected_behavior: Customer edit panel mostra billing e shipping addresses separados com valores diferentes

notes_template.intuit: Customer edit panel shows billing and shipping addresses with different values
notes_template.internal: Navigation: Sales > Customers > Select customer > Edit

features.name: DTM Vendor CC/BCC
features.objective: Adicionar campos CC/BCC para emails de vendor (parity com QB Desktop)
features.expected_behavior: Vendor edit mostra campos CC e BCC alem de Email principal

navigation.wait_for: Vendor edit panel with email fields

notes_template.intuit: CC/BCC fields not visible. Only Email and Other fields shown. Feature flag likely not enabled.
notes_template.internal: Navigation works: Expenses and Bills, Vendors, select vendor, Edit. Need CC/BCC fields enabled.

features.name: DTM Vendor Notes
features.objective: Adicionar notas e comentarios a registros de vendor
features.expected_behavior: Vendor mostra aba Notes com multiplas notas, icones star, timestamps, campos Add comment

notes_template.intuit: Notes tab with multiple notes, star icons, timestamps, Add comment fields
notes_template.internal: Feature flag may not be enabled for comments/star functionality

features.name: BI KPIs Library
features.objective: Biblioteca de KPIs pre-definidos com integracao de apps 3P (Salesforce, HubSpot)
features.expected_behavior: KPI Library mostra categorias: Finance, Sales, Projects, HR, Inventory Management. Growth KPIs, Revenue, Churn Rate visiveis.

steps: Reports > KPIs > KPI Scorecard > Manage KPIs

notes_template.intuit: KPI Library accessible via Manage KPIs. Shows Finance, Sales, Projects, HR, Inventory Management categories. Growth KPIs, Revenue, Churn Rate visible.
notes_template.internal: CRM KPIs require 3P app integration (Salesforce, HubSpot). No 3P apps connected in test environment.

features.name: BI KPIs Custom Formula
features.objective: Criar KPIs customizados com formulas personalizadas
features.expected_behavior: Form Create KPI com campos: KPI name, Category, Formula editor, Unit

steps: Reports > KPIs > KPI Scorecard > Manage KPIs > Create KPI

notes_template.intuit: Create KPI form accessible via Reports > KPIs > KPI Scorecard > Manage KPIs > Create KPI
notes_template.internal: Custom KPI creation with Formula editor requires Company View (not Consolidated). Form shows KPI name, Category, Formula, and Unit fields.

features.name: BI Dashboards
features.objective: Dashboards visuais de BI com metricas pre-definidas e customizaveis
features.expected_behavior: Dashboards nativos: Profitability, Cash Flow, Balance Sheet, Accounts Receivable, Revenue

notes_template.intuit: Pre-canned dashboards available: Profitability, Cash Flow, Balance Sheet, Accounts Receivable, Revenue. Sales Performance dashboard requires 3P app (Monday.com) connection. Projects Performance needs project data.
notes_template.internal: Navigation works: Reports > Dashboards. Users can open pre-built or create custom. 3P dashboards unavailable without app connection.

features.name: BI Advanced Reporting
features.objective: Customizacao visual de reports e formulas customizadas
features.expected_behavior: Profit and Loss com: Switch to modern view, Customize, Save customization, filters, toolbar (Collapse, Sort, Add notes, See chart), export

steps: Reports > Standard reports > Profit and Loss > Customize

notes_template.intuit: Report customization available: visual formatting, add rows/columns with custom calculations, print/export with formatting preserved.
notes_template.internal: All customization tools visible: Switch to modern view, Customize, Save customization. Filters and toolbar complete. Export via Email, Print, Excel, PDF.

features.name: BI Global Report Settings
features.objective: Configuracoes globais de report que cascateiam para todos os reports
features.expected_behavior: Panel com Visual (highlights, banded rows, gridlines) e Formatting (header, footer, number, view)

notes_template.intuit: Global report settings cascade across all standard reports for consistency.
notes_template.internal: Settings panel shows Visual and Formatting sections. Confirms 'These customizations apply to standard and custom reports'.

features.name: BI Management Reports
features.objective: Reports gerenciais combinando multiplos statements financeiros com texto e formatacao customizada
features.expected_behavior: Management Reports page com Drafts/Published tabs, Create report button, lista de reports existentes

notes_template.intuit: Create, edit, and publish management reports combining multiple financial statements with custom text and formatting.
notes_template.internal: Page shows Drafts/Published tabs, Create report button, existing reports. Filter by Date Range, Created by, Search. Legacy option available.

features.name: Project Phases - Create Project
features.objective: Criar projetos com fases para tracking de construction
features.expected_behavior: Projects page com Create project button e lista de projetos

notes_template.intuit: Project creation with phase tracking for construction management.
notes_template.internal: Entry point for Project Phases v2 flow.

features.name: Project Phases - Create Estimate
features.objective: Criar estimates vinculados a fases de projeto
features.expected_behavior: Estimate form com Phase dropdown

steps: Projects > Project > Add to project > Estimate

notes_template.intuit: Estimates linked to project phases for construction cost tracking.
notes_template.internal: Part of Project Phases v2 workflow - 5 screenshots total.

features.name: Project Phases - Create Budget
features.objective: Criar budgets com opcao Group by Phase
features.expected_behavior: Budget form com Group by Phase option

notes_template.intuit: Budgets with Group by Phase option for construction phase tracking.
notes_template.internal: Part of Project Phases v2 workflow.

features.name: Project Phases - Create Expense
features.objective: Criar expenses vinculados a fases de projeto
features.expected_behavior: Expense form com Phase dropdown

notes_template.intuit: Expenses linked to project phases for cost allocation.
notes_template.internal: Part of Project Phases v2 workflow.

features.name: Project Phases - Create PO
features.objective: Criar Purchase Orders vinculados a fases de projeto
features.expected_behavior: PO form com Phase dropdown

steps: Expenses > Purchase Order > Link to project

notes_template.intuit: Purchase Orders linked to project phases for procurement tracking.
notes_template.internal: Part of Project Phases v2 workflow - final of 5 screenshots.

features.name: Cost Groups - List
features.objective: Visualizar e gerenciar Cost Groups para construction
features.expected_behavior: Products & Services com coluna COST GROUP, DFY banner com Review button

navigation.wait_for: Products list with Cost Group column

notes_template.intuit: Cost groups visible in Products & Services list. DFY experience suggests cost groups automatically.
notes_template.internal: Products page shows COST GROUP column and assignment banner.

features.name: Cost Groups - Detail
features.objective: Gerenciar Cost Groups (Equipment, Labor, Material, etc.)
features.expected_behavior: Manage Cost Groups page com lista de grupos e Add Cost Group button

steps: Sales > Products & Services > More > Manage cost groups

notes_template.intuit: Create and assign cost groups to products/services. Track performance by cost group.
notes_template.internal: Manage Cost Groups shows existing groups: Equipment, Labor, Material, etc. Add button available.

features.name: Budgets V3
features.objective: Budgets enhanced com print e download capability
features.expected_behavior: Budget editor com Print/Download options

notes_template.intuit: Enhanced budgets with print and download capability.
notes_template.internal: Print/Download option at bottom of budget detail screen.

features.name: AIA Billing
features.objective: Progress invoicing com colunas estilo AIA para construction
features.expected_behavior: Project Summary com Actual vs Estimated comparacao, barras de progresso

notes_template.intuit: Progress invoicing from estimates with AIA-style columns.
notes_template.internal: Project Summary mostra Actual vs Estimated para Income, Costs, Profit. Barras de progresso mostram percentual de conclusao.

features.name: Certified Payroll
features.objective: Gerar Certified Payroll Report em formato WH-347 para projetos governamentais
features.expected_behavior: Reports > Certified Payroll Report disponivel

notes_template.intuit: Generate Certified Payroll Report in WH-347 format for government projects.
notes_template.internal: URL /certifiedpayrollreport returned 404. Feature may require QBO Payroll subscription or specific feature flag.

features.name: Project Estimate
features.objective: Criar Project Estimates para construction
features.expected_behavior: Add to project dropdown com Project estimate option

steps: Projects > Select project > Add to project > Project estimate

notes_template.intuit: Project Estimate feature available from Add to project dropdown within project details.
notes_template.internal: Screenshot shows Add to project dropdown expanded with Project estimate option visible.

features.name: Approval Workflow
features.objective: Workflow de aprovacao para pagamento de bills
features.expected_behavior: Bills page com coluna BILL APPROVAL e status Approved/Pending

notes_template.intuit: Bill payment approval workflow with waiting for approval status.
notes_template.internal: Bills page shows BILL APPROVAL column with Approved status (green checkmark). Schedule payment action available.

features.name: Instant Payments / Bill Pay
features.objective: Pagamentos instantaneos para vendors (business days ate 5 PM PT)
features.expected_behavior: Bills page com scheduling options incluindo instant payment

notes_template.intuit: Instant Payments available on business days until 5 PM PT with 1% fee (min $10, max $500).
notes_template.internal: Bills page accessible with Unpaid tab. BILL APPROVAL column visible.

features.name: AI Agent - Accounting
features.objective: AI para reconciliacao, Ready to post, colaboracao em transacoes
features.expected_behavior: Bank Transactions com AI suggestions baseadas em bank description, vendor patterns, historico

notes_template.intuit: AI-powered reconciliation, Ready to post suggestions, Collaboration features. Banking-level intelligence for transaction categorization.
notes_template.internal: Accounting Agent active. Bank Transactions shows AI suggestions. Reconcile PDF upload requires flag enablement.

features.name: AI Agent - Payment
features.objective: AI para invoicing: Invoice Assist, Smart Draft Messages, Business Feed cards, Reminders
features.expected_behavior: Invoice com Assist panel, Smart Draft email, Business Feed payment cards

notes_template.intuit: Payments agent for invoicing: Invoice-level Assist, Smart Draft Messages, Business Feed with AI cards, Invoice Reminders.
notes_template.internal: Invoice Assist panel on left. Smart Draft generates context-aware emails. Business Feed shows Finance and Cost Groups Agent cards.

features.name: AI Agent - Customer
features.objective: Import leads from Gmail/Outlook, draft estimates, draft email responses, schedule meetings
features.expected_behavior: Customers > Leads com Import leads from inbox button, Google connection modal

notes_template.intuit: Import leads from Gmail/Outlook integration. AI helps draft estimates, email responses, schedule meetings.
notes_template.internal: Leads shows Import from inbox button. Google connection modal with 3-step flow. Gmail not connected in demo.

features.name: AI Agent - Payroll
features.objective: AI assistant para tarefas de payroll
features.expected_behavior: Payroll Overview com AI Agent UI elements

notes_template.intuit: Payroll Agent: AI-powered assistant for payroll tasks. VALIDATION STATUS: PARTIAL - Payroll module is active but AI Agent feature NOT enabled by Intuit.
notes_template.internal: APRENDIZADO: Algumas features nao podem ser 100% validadas. Payroll funciona mas AI Agent UI nao presente. Requer habilitacao pela Intuit.

features.name: AI Agent - Project
features.objective: AI para project management: budget import, estimates, cost allocation, profitability
features.expected_behavior: Projects com AI Agent features

notes_template.intuit: AI-powered project management with budget import, estimates, cost allocation, profitability tracking.
notes_template.internal: Interface manual 100% funcional. AI Agent propriamente dito requer habilitacao pela Intuit.

features.name: AI Agent - Finance
features.objective: AI financial summary com KPIs, budgets analysis, monthly insights
features.expected_behavior: Financial summary loading com: Analyzing company health, Identifying KPIs, Fetching budgets

notes_template.intuit: AI-powered financial summary with KPIs, budgets analysis, monthly insights.
notes_template.internal: Finance Agent DISPONIVEL. Summary mostra: Analyzing company health, Identifying KPIs, Fetching budgets, Building monthly summary.

features.name: AI Agent - Solutions
features.objective: IES-exclusive AI agent para Dimensions widget in Business Feed
features.expected_behavior: Business Feed com Dimensions widget

notes_template.intuit: IES-exclusive AI agent for Dimensions widget in Business Feed.
notes_template.internal: Business Feed DISPONIVEL com AI widgets (Overdue bills, Bill due soon). Dimensions widget pode requerer IES tier especifico.

features.name: AI Agent - Sales Tax
features.objective: Early Access - Pre-file check widget in Business Feed
features.expected_behavior: Sales Tax Overview com AI pre-file check

notes_template.intuit: Early Access - Pre-file check widget in Business Feed.
notes_template.internal: Sales Tax Overview funcional com 4 agencias (CA, LA, OH, OK). AI widget Pre-file check pode aparecer em epoca de filing.

features.name: WFS: W2 Scalability
features.objective: Backend performance - improved load time for W-2 lists with large payroll volumes
features.expected_behavior: N/A - Backend enhancement only

notes_template.intuit: Backend performance enhancement - improved load time and rendering for W-2 lists with large payroll volumes. Uses virtual scrolling, lazy loading, and CDN caching.
notes_template.internal: Performance-only enhancement. No UI changes to validate. Demo tenant does not run Payroll at scale.

features.name: WFS: Run Payroll Processing Improvements
features.objective: Backend performance - faster payroll processing for high employee counts
features.expected_behavior: N/A - Backend enhancement only

notes_template.intuit: Backend performance enhancement - faster payroll processing for high employee counts. Uses async job queuing, DB sharding, and connection pooling.
notes_template.internal: Performance-only enhancement. No UI changes to validate. Demo tenant lacks scale to observe improvement.

features.name: WFS: Paycheck Corrections Improvements
features.objective: Backend workflow - consolidates multiple amendment tickets into single correction case
features.expected_behavior: N/A - Backend workflow only

notes_template.intuit: Back-office workflow improvement - consolidates multiple amendment tickets into single correction case using event sourcing pattern.
notes_template.internal: Backend workflow change. Customer-facing UI unchanged. No seeding or automation needed.
